news.title: Doctoral student named research coordinator for Holmes Scholar Council
news.summary_en: Jayla Langford, doctoral student in Higher Education and Student Affairs, has been elected by peers across the United States, and will lead efforts to advance the scholarly mission of the Holmes Scholars Program by supporting research, publications, and conference participation.

news.title: Alumna honored with dissertation award
news.summary_en: Mariah Pol, a 2025 graduate of the Teacher Education and Curriculum Studies program, was awarded the Best Dissertation Award from the Peace Education Special Interest Group of the Comparative and International Education Society at their annual meeting this year in San Francisco.
